log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster's turn ---

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 17] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 8 falling damage. HP: 170/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 17] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 6 vs DC 11]
Young Red Dragon attacks Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 13] HIT! 19 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 18/59
Young Red Dragon attacks Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster with Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 13] HIT! 19 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Dragon Fear Caster HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
